lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there!

lines.speaker: Ali the Smith
lines.text: You seem rather cheerful. Is there anything you're after?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What can you tell me about Al Kharid?

lines.speaker: Ali the Smith
lines.text: Well, it's hot and full of sand.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Anything else?

lines.speaker: Ali the Smith
lines.text: Don't ask me, I'm not from around here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So where are you from?

lines.speaker: Ali the Smith
lines.text: A town to the south of the Shantay Pass, called Pollnivneach.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, what do you do here?

lines.speaker: Ali the Smith
lines.text: Not very much, at the moment. I came from further south to set up a smithy here...

lines.speaker: Ali the Smith
lines.text: ...but we still haven't set up the shops, so we have no customers yet.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I hear you work for Ali Morrisane...

lines.speaker: Ali the Smith
lines.text: Yes, he's the one who persuaded us to come here.

lines.speaker: Ali the Smith
lines.text: He said we'd have lots of customers once we set up our shops, and all he asks for is a cut of the profits.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe I should talk to him...

lines.speaker: Ali the Smith
lines.text: Of course. He's always happy to talk to possible business partners.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I hear you've been threatening the other shopkeepers.

lines.speaker: Ali the Smith
lines.text: What? Who's spreading that rumour?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, one of the shopkeepers told me a man with a large hammer came to threaten them.

lines.speaker: Ali the Smith
lines.text: Don't pay any attention to those people.

lines.speaker: Ali the Smith
lines.text: They're just worried that they'll lose money when we open our shops.
